evidence: Intent declares local_only storage mode.
Target briefs forbid backend dependencies.
Privacy proof states progress remains on-device.
privacy.local_only.failure_consequence: StudyPath stops qualifying as a privacy-preserving public demo.

evidence: Intent runtime dependency policy is no_runtime_cloud_services.
Android, web, and Windows target briefs forbid backend requirements.
Privacy proof states no cloud account is required.
network.no_runtime_cloud.failure_consequence: Runtime execution would no longer satisfy offline-first materialization constraints.

evidence: Intent privacy section sets analytics to none.
All target briefs explicitly forbid analytics.
Privacy proof rejects analytics SDK inclusion.
analytics.none.failure_consequence: Student privacy claims would become invalid.

evidence: All declared data stores mark transmission as forbidden.
Agent delegation forbids learner_data_transmission.
Privacy proof limits export to user-initiated actions only.
student_data.no_transmission.failure_consequence: The demo would violate its stated student-data trust boundary.

evidence: Curriculum pack license is demo-only synthetic curriculum.
Curriculum provenance declares no real exam-board alignment.
README public boundaries reject copyrighted curriculum ingestion.
curriculum.synthetic_and_provenanced.failure_consequence: The example would lose public-demo safety and provenance clarity.

evidence: Accessibility proof requires contrast-safe presentation.
Intent proof gates include accessibility.contrast.
Accessibility profile constrains the study-session plan.
accessibility.contrast.failure_consequence: The demo would fail its accessibility baseline.

evidence: Accessibility proof requires readable typography.
Intent maintain list includes accessibility_baseline.
Target briefs include accessibility support requirements.
accessibility.font_size.failure_consequence: Readable educational use would no longer be supportable.

evidence: Accessibility proof requires low cognitive load and plain language.
Scenario constrains sessions to bounded time windows.
QA report includes low-time and accessibility edge-case checks.
accessibility.low_cognitive_load.failure_consequence: The planner could overwhelm learners and violate the demo's educational safety framing.

evidence: Intent maintain list requires deterministic_local_adaptation.
Intent proof gates include adaptation.deterministic_local.
Agent delegation forbids runtime cloud model calls for adaptation.
adaptation.local_deterministic.failure_consequence: Adaptation would become opaque and non-reproducible.

evidence: Agent delegation caps authority at R3.
No agent may publish, deploy, spend money, or transmit learner data.
MaterializationAgent is limited to target briefs.
permissions.minimality.failure_consequence: The example would exceed bounded-authority expectations for a public demo.

evidence: All three target briefs require offline-first or offline-capable operation.
All three target briefs prohibit analytics and backend dependencies.
All three target briefs treat materialization as specification output rather than deployment.
targets.cross_platform_consistency.failure_consequence: StudyPath would lose coherence as a single cross-platform AICL demo.
